description: The Collector's Edition of boss by hugo boss for men balances a fruity top note with flowery-spicy middle notes of geranium and clove. Strong masculine base notes of sandalwood, cedar and vetiver. Wear this for an evening date or a weekend party at an upscale joint. Quantity: 100 ml Caution FlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
